code:
import io
import string

let input = io.read_to_end()
let n = string.len(input)
mut sum = 0
mut i = 0
mut in_token = false
mut current = ""
while i < n
  match string.byte_at(input, i)
  when Some(b)
    if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13 or b == 11 or b == 12
      if in_token
        match string.parse_int(current)
        when Some(v)
          if v % 2 == 0
            sum = sum + v
          end
        when None
          ()
        end
        current = ""
        in_token = false
      end
    else
      current = "#{current}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
      in_token = true
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
  i = i + 1
end
if in_token
  match string.parse_int(current)
  when Some(v)
    if v % 2 == 0
      sum = sum + v
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
end
println("sum_even=#{sum}")
